# Whisper Kit Integration

## Purpose

This folder contains native Whisper integration code used by SACA speech experiments.

## What Is Here

- Flutter plugin structure for native speech runtime support.
- Android, iOS, Dart, and native source files related to Whisper.

## When To Edit This

- Edit this folder when native Whisper integration needs fixes or upgrades.
- Avoid changing it for normal app UI or diagnosis flow work.

## Related Folders

- `lib/infrastructure/speech/` wraps this integration for the app.
- `assets/models/` stores speech model assets.
